docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-04-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE HURLEY. PLAINTIFF SONIA MARLY GARNER IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER FREDERRICO BEHNCKE #301627 WITH OATH ON FILE. DEFENDANT CONSUELO TIFFANY PALOMINO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER KENNETH WRIGHT WITH OATH ON FILE. SERVICE IS WAIVED PER THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2026 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARNER, SONIA MARLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACUNA, CONSUELO TIFFANY PALOMINO $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
